title: helenium glaucum
intro: Helenium glaucum, also known as greenthread, is a perennial wildflower native to North America, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and narrow, thread-like leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective against various bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Helenium glaucum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate colds and flu, and soothe digestive issues. Helenium glaucum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
